    security/bcrypt: Deprecate port

    Hasn't seen updates in 15 years, insecure Blowfish ECB mode,
    unauthenticated encryption.

    See:
    https://bugs.gentoo.org/592114
    https://bugs.debian.org/cgi-bin/bugreport.cgi?bug=864253
